openmeter/billing/rating/service.purpose: Stateless rating service that implements rating.Service by dispatching to per-price-type Pricer implementations via a priceMutator pipeline. Orchestrates pre/post-calculation mutators around concrete pricers to produce DetailedLines with totals.

patterns.name: priceMutator pipeline assembly
patterns.description: getPricerFor() constructs a priceMutator combining a concrete rate.Pricer with ordered PreCalculation and PostCalculation mutator slices. Caller must not bypass getPricerFor() and instantiate pricers directly.

patterns.name: opts.IgnoreMinimumCommitment gate
patterns.description: MinAmountCommitment mutator is only appended when GenerateDetailedLinesOptions.IgnoreMinimumCommitment is false. Charges pricing sets this flag to suppress minimum commitment on partial billing runs.

patterns.name: Usage nil check before FlatPrice
patterns.description: input.Usage is only populated for non-FlatPrice lines. Flat lines must not set Usage; non-flat lines must call GetMeteredQuantity/GetMeteredPreLinePeriodQuantity and set input.Usage before calling linePricer.GenerateDetailedLines.

patterns.name: CurrencyCalculator for all rounding
patterns.description: currencyx.Calculator obtained from in.GetCurrency().Calculator() must be used for all arithmetic rounding via calc.RoundToPrecision. Raw alpacadecimal.Mul results are only rounded by the calculator.

patterns.name: getTotalsFromDetailedLines aggregation
patterns.description: After linePricer.GenerateDetailedLines returns, getTotalsFromDetailedLines computes per-DetailedLine totals and sums them with totals.Sum. Do not compute totals inline in the pricer; always go through this function.

patterns.name: validateStandardLine before any pricer call
patterns.description: GenerateDetailedLines calls validateStandardLine first to enforce that price is non-nil and that progressively-billed service period matches service period for non-progressive lines.
patterns.example: if err := validateStandardLine(in); err != nil { return ..., fmt.Errorf("validating billable line: %w", err) }

patterns.name: isDependingOnIncreaseOnlyMeters for progressive billing gate
patterns.description: ResolveBillablePeriod forcibly disables ProgressiveBilling unless the underlying meter aggregation is Sum, Count, Max, or UniqueCount. Other aggregations must be billed in arrears.

key_file_guides.role: Zero-field service struct and New() constructor; sole entry point for DI consumers to obtain rating.Service.
key_file_guides.watch_for: service has no fields — all state is passed via method arguments; do not add fields without reason.

key_file_guides.role: getPricerFor() factory that maps productcatalog price types to concrete rate.Pricer + mutator slices; priceMutator orchestrates the pipeline.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New price types require a new case in the switch; forgetting a case returns an unsupported-price-type error at runtime.

key_file_guides.role: GenerateDetailedLines entry point: validates input, resolves currency calculator, builds PricerCalculateInput, calls pipeline, aggregates totals.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Usage must not be set for FlatPriceType lines; getTotalsFromDetailedLines must always be called on pricer output.

key_file_guides.role: ResolveBillablePeriod delegates to the pricer after gating ProgressiveBilling on meter aggregation type.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Returning true from isDependingOnIncreaseOnlyMeters for a non-monotonic aggregation (e.g. Avg, Latest) causes incorrect progressive billing.

anti_patterns: Instantiating rate.Unit{}/rate.Flat{}/etc. directly in service methods instead of going through getPricerFor()
Setting input.Usage for FlatPriceType lines — causes validation errors in PricerCalculateInput.Validate()
Computing DetailedLine totals inside a pricer or mutator instead of delegating to getTotalsFromDetailedLines
Adding state (fields) to the service struct — the service is intentionally stateless; all computation inputs must flow through method parameters
Using raw alpacadecimal arithmetic for final amounts without passing through currencyx.Calculator.RoundToPrecision

decisions.decision: priceMutator wraps a single Pricer with ordered pre/post mutator slices rather than embedding mutation logic inside each Pricer.
decisions.rationale: Keeps pricing concerns (tier math, period gating) separate from cross-cutting concerns (discounts, commitments, credits) so each can evolve independently.

decisions.decision: service struct has no fields; New() returns an interface backed by an empty struct.
decisions.rationale: The rating service is purely computational — it holds no connection pools, caches, or configuration. Statelessness simplifies testing and avoids accidental shared state across concurrent billing runs.

decisions.decision: getTotalsFromDetailedLines is called in GenerateDetailedLines, not inside priceMutator.GenerateDetailedLines.
decisions.rationale: Totals aggregation depends on the currency calculator which is resolved at the service layer; pricers and mutators operate on raw DetailedLines to stay currency-agnostic.

code_examples.scenario: Adding a new price type pricer: register it in getPricerFor and implement rate.Pricer
